content: Illustrative MSCI-style issuer credit assessment for General Electric Company. This assessment rests on GE's Q2 fundamentals as of 2025-08-20 and a rating action dated 2025-09-15 — both predating GE's Q3 10-Q filed 2025-11-05. Because the leverage input reflects the higher pre-deleveraging Q2 debt load, this assessment lands one notch weaker (BBB-) than the two anchor providers that acted on the fresher Q3 data. The divergence is a freshness artifact of the leverage input, not a fundamental disagreement about GE's credit.
